title: isodon muliensis
intro: Isodon muliensis, also known as Himalayan isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Isodon muliensis include its potential to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Isodon muliensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for its medicinal properties.
